patterns_found.likely_purpose: Update infobox field values, usually chronology or stats.
patterns_found.risk_notes: BLP risk if updating living person facts without citation. Template-namespace change — affects all transclusions.

patterns_found.name: Revert or undo
evidence_samples: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1343037855|1343037855]] by [[Special:Contributions/Dissident93|Dissident93]] ([[User talk:Dissident93|talk]]) nevermind, this was discussed and I forgot
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1328445443|1328445443]] by [[Special:Contributions/Dafootballguy|Dafootballguy]] ([[User talk:Dafootballguy|talk]]) useless? if they are redundant just say so
patterns_found.risk_notes: Context-dependent. Review what was reverted before mimicking. Template-namespace change — affects all transclusions.

patterns_found.name: Lead section rewrite
evidence_samples: lead trim, half of it is about naming rights
independently notable wife can belong in the lead
a single player didn't "break" a losing streak. this is [[WP:UNDUE]] for the lead
HS is usually omitted in the lead unless it was historic or something
patterns_found.likely_purpose: Rewrite or update the article lead.
patterns_found.risk_notes: Lead must summarize body. BLP sensitivity applies.

we need a better source than the [[WP:USERG]] VGMdb (can just cite the liner notes but not the database itself)

patterns_found.risk_notes: Low risk. Check ref name collisions.
